name: Policy Sensorium (CBS)
description: Springdrift-inspired Cognitive Behavior System: injects self-perception signals before each LLM call and tracks cycle outcomes for D'gating.

sensoriumWindow.description: Number of recent cycles to consider for metrics

dGateThreshold.description: D' threshold below which actions are gated

sensoriumWindow.label: CBS Sensorium Window
sensoriumWindow.help: Number of recent cognitive cycles to consider for CBS signal computation

dGateThreshold.label: D' Gating Threshold
dGateThreshold.help: D' score below which the agent should slow down and reassess strategy
